title: centella asiatica var. floridana
intro: Centella asiatica var. floridana, also known as the Indian pennywort or gotu kola, is a variety of the Centella asiatica plant, a perennial herb native to Asia and Africa. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centella asiatica var. floridana include improved cognitive function, reduced anxiety and stress, enhanced wound healing, and improved skin health due to its ability to promote collagen production and reduce inflammation. Centella asiatica var. floridana can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and vitality.
